    Class
    Description
    Xml
    Annotation for specifying various XML options for the XML and RDF/XML serializers.

    Class
    Description
    Xml
    Annotation for specifying various XML options for the XML and RDF/XML serializers.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml used by org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
    Class
    Description
    Namespace
    Represents a simple namespace mapping between a simple name and URI.
    XmlFormat
    XML format to use when serializing a POJO.
    XmlMetaProvider
    Interface for providing access to XmlClassMeta, XmlBeanMeta, and XmlBeanPropertyMeta objects.
    XmlParser
    Parses text generated by the XmlSerializer class back into a POJO model.
    XmlParser.Builder
    Builder class.
    XmlParserSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of XmlParser.
    XmlParserSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    XmlReader
    Wrapper class around a XMLStreamReader.
    XmlSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to XML.
    XmlSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    XmlSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of XmlSerializer.
    XmlSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    XmlSerializerSession.ContentResult
    Identifies what the contents were of a serialized bean.
    XmlWriter
    Specialized writer for serializing XML.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml used by org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
    Class
    Description
    Namespace
    Represents a simple namespace mapping between a simple name and URI.
    XmlBeanMeta
    Metadata on beans specific to the XML serializers and parsers pulled from the @Xml annotation on the class.
    XmlBeanPropertyMeta
    Metadata on bean properties specific to the XML serializers and parsers pulled from the @Xml annotation on the bean property.
    XmlClassMeta
    Metadata on classes specific to the XML serializers and parsers pulled from the @Xml annotation on the class.
    XmlMetaProvider
    Interface for providing access to XmlClassMeta, XmlBeanMeta, and XmlBeanPropertyMeta objects.

    Class
    Description
    Namespace
    Represents a simple namespace mapping between a simple name and URI.
    Xml
    Annotation for specifying various XML options for the XML and RDF/XML serializers.
    XmlAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    XmlApply
    Dynamically applies a @Xml annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
    XmlApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    XmlBeanMeta
    Metadata on beans specific to the XML serializers and parsers pulled from the @Xml annotation on the class.
    XmlBeanPropertyMeta
    Metadata on bean properties specific to the XML serializers and parsers pulled from the @Xml annotation on the bean property.
    XmlClassMeta
    Metadata on classes specific to the XML serializers and parsers pulled from the @Xml annotation on the class.
    XmlConfig
    Annotation for specifying config properties defined in XmlSerializer, XmlDocSerializer, and XmlParser.
    XmlDocSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to HTTP responses as XML.
    XmlDocSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of XmlDocSerializer.
    XmlDocSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    XmlEventAllocator
    XMLEventAllocator base class.
    XmlFormat
    XML format to use when serializing a POJO.
    XmlMetaProvider
    Interface for providing access to XmlClassMeta, XmlBeanMeta, and XmlBeanPropertyMeta objects.
    XmlParser
    Parses text generated by the XmlSerializer class back into a POJO model.
    XmlParser.Builder
    Builder class.
    XmlParser.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed XmlParser.create() / XmlParser.copy() path.
    XmlParserSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of XmlParser.
    XmlParserSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    XmlReader
    Wrapper class around a XMLStreamReader.
    XmlReporter
    XMLReporter base class.
    XmlResolver
    XMLResolver base class.
    XmlSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to XML.
    XmlSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    XmlSerializer.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed XmlSerializer.create() / XmlSerializer.copy() path.
    XmlSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of XmlSerializer.
    XmlSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.

    Identifies what the contents were of a serialized bean.
